description_long: This is a bulbous ceramic vase with a wide, rounded body that tapers smoothly to a narrow neck and a slightly flared rim. The exterior surface is predominantly white and features a lively, abstract pattern of brushstrokes in yellow, red, blue, and black, reminiscent of modern art or expressive watercolor painting. The interior of the vase is a solid, vibrant blue, providing a striking contrast to the multicolored exterior. The painted motifs are irregular and organic, with no discernible symmetry, giving the vase a playful and artistic character. The surface appears matte with a subtle texture, suggesting it is unglazed or only lightly finished. This decorative piece would stand out as a contemporary accent in urban public or private spaces.
description: A white ceramic vase with a bulbous shape, decorated with abstract, colorful brushstroke patterns and a blue interior. The surface is matte and artistically expressive.
description_view_0: The front view shows the widest part of the vase, with prominent yellow and red brushstrokes and a clear view of the blue interior rim.
description_view_1: This side view highlights more scattered, smaller brushstrokes in red and yellow, with less concentration of color than the front.
description_view_2: The back view displays a more subdued pattern, with blue and yellow strokes dominating and less red visible.
description_view_3: This view features a dense cluster of red and yellow brushstrokes, with some blue accents and a clear view of the vase's curvature.
